reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2559334849713613102/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toVVVsTnViazQyTVhaTVkwcFdiVk5VUkUxVmNVRRAB

reviews.comment:
En nuestro último servis antes de viajar fuimos al ACA nos atendió Cristian y nos asesoró sobre nuestras dudas sobre el estado del auto  para viaje, luego fuimos al shop y nos atendió Dana muy amable,por nuestra ansiedad  del viaje le contamos todo nuestro itinerario mientras nos preparaba el desayuno. Excelente atención tanto en el shop como en la playa.

(Translated by Google)
For our last service before traveling, we went to the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). Cristian helped us and answered our questions about the car's condition for the trip. Then we went to the shop and Dana was very friendly. Because we were so excited about the trip, we told her our entire itinerary while she prepared breakfast. Excellent service both at the shop and at the service station.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por tu reseña. Te esperamos nuevamente ! gracias!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2559334849713613102/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2twRmRuWm9ZUzFaWkhkd1lUUlZjbEJ3U0RGNWRtYxAB

reviews.comment:
Lo mejor en boxes. Hace años hago el services allí! La atención de Cristian da tranquilidad y confianza. 1 gran amigo.
No es algo que se encuentran en cualquier lado.
Compromiso y excelencia.
Queremos destacar la brillante limpieza de los baños!!!
Agradecemos la atención d los playeros..
Y de Dana en servicompras.

(Translated by Google)
The best service station. I've been getting my car serviced there for years! Cristian's service is incredibly helpful and inspires confidence. He's a great friend.
It's not something you find just anywhere. Commitment and excellence.
We want to highlight the impeccably clean restrooms!
We appreciate the service from the attendants... and from Dana at the convenience store.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Lucas por tu visita!
